title: Machine Translation — Pie chart (contrôle)

L2_specific: attention mechanism vs recurrent neural networks
transformer architecture for sequence to sequence translation
self-attention replaces recurrence for machine translation
L3_detailed: the Transformer architecture achieves the highest BLEU score on WMT 2014 EN-DE translation
le Transformer surpasse les réseaux récurrents et convolutifs grâce au mécanisme d'attention
self-attention alone outperforms LSTM and CNN on translation benchmarks
